generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for defense systems makes us vulnerable? Experts warn that without strategic autonomy, we risk being held hostage by foreign powers during crises. It's time to prioritize national security over short-term convenience. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
